emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Knockranny House Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 65/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

MEDIUM
--------------------
- 6 inline style blocks
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No meta description
 HIGH
--------------------
- 4 broken links
 HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL redirect
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing H1 heading


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: Inline CSS can't be cached by browsers. External CSS files speed up repeat visits.
issues.label: 6 inline style blocks
issues.check: View page source and count <style> tags. More than 2-3 is inefficient.
issues.siteHint: Cached pages load 4x faster on return visits.

issues.detail: Search results show a generic snippet instead of a compelling description.
issues.label: No meta description
issues.check: Search 'site:[business URL]' on Google. Does the snippet look well-written?
issues.siteHint: Meta descriptions directly impact click-through rates from Google by 5-15%.

issues.detail: Broken links frustrate visitors and hurt SEO rankings.
issues.label: 4 broken links
issues.check: Click through every navigation link. Any page returning 404?
issues.siteHint: Each broken link costs you potential bookings.

issues.detail: Visitors reaching HTTP are not redirected to HTTPS, risking security warnings.
issues.label: No SSL redirect
issues.check: Type http://[domain] - does it automatically go to https://?
issues.siteHint: Google flags non-HTTPS sites as 'Not Secure' in Chrome.

issues.detail: The page is missing its primary heading, which hurts SEO and structure.
issues.label: Missing H1 heading
issues.check: Inspect the page - is there an <h1> tag near the top?
issues.siteHint: H1 headings are one of the top 3 SEO ranking factors for Google.
